meta.title: Overall Equipment Effectiveness (OEE) As An ICS Cybersecurity Metric
meta.description: Inaki Eguia first explains the OEE calculation and then goes over some ICS examples. He makes the case that OEE is a metric that should drive the determination of the security posture and where security related resources should be spent.
